caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in large gold letters, and a gold watch on his left wrist. He wears large over-ear headphones and sits behind a dark desk equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring several gold stars and the repeated text "UNICORN HUSTLE". To the right, a sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". A small black container on the desk displays the red and white text "BOSS TALK ON!". The man remains in a stationary seated position, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression, his hands clasped in front of him on the desk. Across the sequence of frames, there is virtually no movement, and the composition of the scene remains constant.
